name: William Sloane Coffin
abstract: William Sloane Coffin Jr. (June 1, 1924 – April 12, 2006) was an American Christian clergyman and peace activist.

about_quotes.speaker: Hentoff Nat
about_quotes.evidence: I did Eldridge Cleaver. I did William Sloane Coffin, people like that.
about_quotes.doc_title: Hentoff Nat — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
